'''Novor 23''', in the [[Novor system/Legends|Novor system]] was the [[Ry'coz]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was located on the [[Salin Corridor/Legends|Salin Corridor]], and was a busy [[Planet/Legends|world]] with large [[Human/Legends|Human]] and [[Alien/Legends|alien]] populations living in thriving cities. Its capital was [[Luj City]], which was a key financial center of [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]]—even though the Novor system itself was in the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]]. The local corporate offices of [[Jatayus Outbound]] were located on the world; so was one of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]]'s villas, built in the [[Vos'yr valley]].

Originally the twenty-third planet of the [[Star system/Legends|system]], the expansion of its [[Star/Legends|sun]] [[Novor Major]] into its [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]] phase, leaving Novor 23 in the sixth orbital position out of the remaining sixteen worlds.
